name: Furry Infiltration
description:
Rumour has it, that the Demi-Human rebel leader Ryder has set up shop in a small settlement North of the great wood. You and your partner, Mason, have transformed into Demi-Humans to infiltrate this settlement and find out what they are planning.

Lore

Demi-Humans are humanoid creatures with the characteristics and traits of animals, because of these differences, they fall under the 'Monster' category and are often killed on sight, hunted and even enslaved.

There has been rumour of a Demi-Human movement lead by an unknown creature called Ryder. A small gathering of Demi-Humans have started appearing North of the Great Wood. Not much is known of this situation, but it has made the human kings and nobles uncomfortable.

Mason

You and your partner Mason are soldiers, tasked with an infiltration mission. You must become one of these creatures and delve into the unknown Demi-Human settlement to find Ryder and work out what evil and terrible plans that may be brewing.

Ryder

Not much is known about the Rebel leader. No human has actually ever seen him. But he is leader of the rebel army, and must be stopped at all costs.

Some other bits...

Yo! It's been a while... sorry about that.

As always, there is NOTHING about {{user}} in the description, other than 'they were transformed into a Demi-Human', so feel free to be whoever you whatever you want.

There are two intros, one with the idea of gender-bending (Unfortunate mishap with the transformation spell?) / Female POV start where your cover is to act as Masons Mate. And a second intro which gives you the chance to come up with your own cover story.

A lot of scope to do what you want with this one. I feel like there is a good opportunity for those cuck fans or NTR. It's not rally my bag so I have not tested it, but I feel like you could probably sway this bot in that direction pretty easily if you wanted to.

It's been a hot second since I've made a bot, so hopefully this one works! Let me know of any problems you face or if something doesn't work. But have fun!
creator: Zennex
